description: Liquid pooling beneath pipe flanges, valves, or fittings indicating active leak
visual_signals: liquid puddle beneath flange connection
dripping from valve body or packing gland
wet spot forming under pipe fitting

description: Staining or discoloration from weeping leak on pipe exterior or equipment surface
visual_signals: dark streak running down from flange bolt
discolored trail below valve stem
dried residue pattern indicating slow seepage

description: Hydrocarbon sheen visible on water surfaces in drainage ditches, sumps, or containment areas
visual_signals: rainbow oil sheen on standing water
iridescent film on drainage ditch surface
oily discoloration on water in sump or catch basin

description: Visible steam or vapor release from unintended source such as leaking gasket, cracked weld, or open vent
visual_signals: steam plume from pipe joint or flange
vapor cloud at unexpected location
wispy emission from equipment casing or weld seam

description: External pipe corrosion with visible rust, pitting, or wall thinning on uninsulated piping
visual_signals: orange-brown rust patches on pipe exterior
pitting visible on bare pipe surface
flaking corroded metal on pipe run

description: Corrosion under insulation (CUI) indicators — damaged insulation jacketing with rust weeping or staining at seams
visual_signals: rust-colored staining bleeding through insulation jacket
damaged or torn aluminum cladding with rust visible beneath
brown weeping at insulation jacket seams or termination points

description: Missing insulation cladding sections exposing pipe insulation material to weather and moisture ingress
visual_signals: bare insulation material visible where jacketing is absent
section of pipe with metal cladding torn away
gap in insulation covering exposing mineral wool or calcium silicate

description: Structural steel corrosion on pipe supports, platforms, or building frames compromising load capacity
visual_signals: heavy rust on structural I-beam or column
corrosion flaking on pipe support bracket
section loss visible on steel grating support members

description: Vessel or tank showing visible deformation such as bulging, denting, or shell distortion
visual_signals: bulge or outward deformation on vessel shell
dent or impact damage on tank wall
visible waviness or distortion on pressure vessel surface

description: Scaffolding missing toe boards or guardrails creating fall and dropped-object hazards
visual_signals: scaffold platform edge without toe board
missing mid-rail or top-rail on scaffold level
open side of scaffold without guardrail system

description: Scaffolding erected without current inspection tag or color-coded tag indicating it has not been certified for use
visual_signals: scaffold with no inspection tag visible
red or out-of-date tag on scaffold access point
scaffold missing color-coded competent person tag

description: Damaged or missing platform grating on walkways, mezzanines, or elevated structures
visual_signals: section of grating missing from walkway
bent or broken grating panel on platform
hole in floor grating creating fall-through hazard

description: Fixed ladder missing handrails, safety cage, or climb-assist system where required
visual_signals: vertical ladder without side rails extending above landing
fixed ladder missing safety cage above 24 feet
ladder rungs without grab bars at top platform

description: Worker in process area without hard hat
visual_signals: person walking in plant area with uncovered head
worker near overhead piping without hard hat
individual in process unit not wearing head protection

description: Worker in process area without safety glasses or required eye protection
visual_signals: person in plant area without safety glasses
worker near chemical handling without eye protection
individual in process zone with no visible eyewear

description: Worker in process area without flame-resistant (FR) coveralls or clothing
visual_signals: person wearing non-FR street clothes in process area
worker in t-shirt or synthetic fabric near hydrocarbons
individual without FR coveralls in operating unit

description: Worker at height without fall protection harness and tie-off where required above 6 feet
visual_signals: person on elevated platform without visible harness
worker climbing structure with no lanyard attached
individual at height with harness unbuckled or lanyard not connected

description: Fire extinguisher missing from designated location in process area
visual_signals: empty fire extinguisher cabinet or bracket
extinguisher sign present but no unit mounted
fire extinguisher station with missing unit

description: Emergency shower or eyewash station access obstructed by equipment, materials, or vegetation
visual_signals: items stacked in front of emergency shower
equipment blocking path to eyewash station
vegetation overgrowth around safety shower access area

description: Wind sock missing, torn, or non-functional preventing wind direction assessment for toxic release response
visual_signals: empty wind sock pole with no sock attached
shredded or torn wind sock fabric
wind sock hanging limp and tangled indicating damage

description: Safety signage missing, illegible, or damaged at hazardous area classification boundaries or process equipment
visual_signals: faded or unreadable hazard sign
sign post with no sign attached
damaged classification placard at area boundary

description: Secondary containment structure showing cracks, deterioration, or compromised integrity
visual_signals: visible crack in concrete containment wall or berm
spalling concrete in secondary containment dike
gap or hole in containment liner

description: Secondary containment drain valve found in open position allowing uncontrolled release of accumulated liquids
visual_signals: drain valve handle in open position on containment wall
liquid draining from containment through open valve
unlocked and open valve at base of dike or berm

description: Oily rags, debris, or combustible waste materials left on walkways or near process equipment
visual_signals: oily rags on grating or walkway surface
debris and waste scattered on platform
combustible materials left near hot equipment or ignition sources
